valid.name: is-null

invalid.name: eq-null

errors.message: `= NULL` always evaluates to NULL (treated as false). Use `IS NULL` / `IS NOT NULL` instead.
`<> NULL` always evaluates to NULL (treated as false). Use `IS NULL` / `IS NOT NULL` instead.
`<> NULL` always evaluates to NULL (treated as false). Use `IS NULL` / `IS NOT NULL` instead.
`= NULL` always evaluates to NULL (treated as false). Use `IS NULL` / `IS NOT NULL` instead.
